hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,re,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin); raw=json.dumps(p.get("tool_input",{}),ensure_ascii=False); pats=[r"\brm\s+-rf\s+(/|~|\.|\*)",r"\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b",r"\bgit\s+clean\s+-fdx\b",r"\bchmod\s+-R\s+777\b",r"\bsudo\b"]; hit=next((x for x in pats if re.search(x,raw)),None); print(json.dumps({"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked by local Codex hook: command matches a destructive pattern."}) if hit else "{}")'
